tasks.title: Confirm purpose, travellers, dates, route, budget and cancellation flexibility
Book transport and lodging using names that match accepted identity documents
Prepare identity, tickets, accommodation, medical and emergency records
Pack for destination weather, baggage limits, medicines and planned activities
Confirm live status, local transfer and an early departure buffer
Plan the Chennai airport, railway-station or bus-terminal transfer around traffic and weather
Verify passport validity, destination entry rules, transit requirements and traveller name consistency
Book flights, lodging and transfers only after checking entry and cancellation conditions
Arrange insurance, medicines, payment methods, foreign exchange and emergency access
Create secure paper and offline digital copies of essential travel records
Review Indian customs and declaration requirements before departure and return
Complete airline checks and reach the international terminal with sufficient buffer

tasks.title: Verify the correct Chennai terminal, airline counter and ground-transfer plan before leaving home

checklists.title: Organize a birthday party in Chennai

tasks.title: Set the date, budget, guest count, age group, format and decision owners
Select and contract a suitable venue with capacity, accessibility and weather backup
Send invitations, track responses and collect dietary or accessibility needs
Confirm food, cake, décor, entertainment, photography and payment milestones
Plan child supervision, food safety, first aid, electrical safety and pickup controls
Create a day-of run sheet, contact list, setup checklist and cleanup handoff
Prepare heat, rain and monsoon contingencies for guests, food and transport
When using a Greater Chennai Corporation community hall, verify slot, capacity, charges, deposit and permitted use
Agree on ceremonies, budget, guest count, dates, responsibilities and payment authority
Reserve ceremony and reception venues with written inclusions, timing and cancellation terms
Build the guest list, invitations, RSVP process, seating, lodging and transport plan
Contract catering, décor, photo/video, music, makeup, clothing and transport vendors
Prepare age, identity, address, ceremony and witness records for applicable marriage registration
Create ceremony-by-ceremony run sheets, payment envelopes, contacts and contingency owners
Reconcile vendors, gifts, rentals, photographs, certificates and remaining payments
Use the current Tamil Nadu registration process to identify the correct registration route, office, documents and appointment

tasks.title: Protect guest transport, outdoor rituals, food and electrical setup from Chennai heat or rain
When using a Greater Chennai Corporation community hall, verify current booking rules and all charges
Confirm safe access, utilities, toilets, lighting, cleaning and protected work areas
Confirm ceremony timing, officiant, supplies and household responsibilities
Invite guests with accurate map, parking, lift, footwear and meal information
Plan food quantities, serving flow, drinking water, allergies and waste handling
Assign entry, ceremony, food, parking, photography and cleanup roles
Notify affected neighbours or building management and prevent blocked access or unmanaged street parking
Provide shade, ventilation, drinking water and rain protection appropriate to the season

checklists.title: Book a Greater Chennai Corporation community hall

tasks.title: Confirm event type, date, attendance, accessibility, kitchen, stage, power and time requirements
Check the official portal by zone, division, hall, month and morning or evening slot
Record current rental, surcharge, GST, deposit, electricity, cleaning and PA-system charges before payment
Verify capacity, full-day slot selection, permitted event use, refund and handover conditions
